description: Ed25519Signer has into_inner_returns_backend and debug_impl_does_not_leak_key_material tests. EcdsaP256Signer and RsaPss2048Signer expose the same two public methods (into_inner, Debug) with zero test coverage. The into_inner path in particular has a trivial implementation but tests serve as a contract that the method exists and returns a usable backend — worth having for consistency and regression protection.
title: Missing tests for into_inner and Debug on P256/RSA signers
